response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer but does not meet the core hard requirements for this embedded networking security role. There is no evidence of Japanese language ability (a hard requirement), no Linux kernel modification experience, no embedded networking or switch/firmware background, and only brief, dated C/C++ exposure at National Instruments roughly a decade ago. Core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, web) does not align with C-based embedded UNIX development for LAN-switch security.
strengths: Long software engineering track record with senior/staff-level roles
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang microservices and C/C++ at National Instruments
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing, dev-ops tooling
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement
No Linux kernel investigation or source modification experience
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, MACsec/802.1X, or network security background; C experience is minimal and dated

key_factors.factor: No embedded/networking security or Linux kernel experience
